xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DisclosureOfNotesOnFinancialRe:
1. The Claims and benefits paid including other expenses pertaining to insurance business is Rs. 18170.74 for the quarter ended March 31, 2026 & Rs. 92340.22 for the year ended March 31, 2026. As the format does not have the particular category, it has been mentioned under other operating expenses.
2. The profit (loss) of Minority interest is Rs. 723.46 for the quarter ended March 31, 2026 & Rs. 3193.49 for the year ended March 31, 2026. The above figures have been mentioned under Exceptional items as the Cashflow Indirect sheet is auto populating the Profit before extraordinary items basis the figure populating in the Total profit (loss) from ordinary activities before tax.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescriptionOfOperatingExpenses: Claims and benefits paid and other expenses pertaining to insurance business
Claims and benefits paid and other expenses pertaining to insurance business
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DisclosureOfNotesOnAssetsAndLi: Employees stock options outstanding, Minority interest & Policyholders' funds have been mentioned under Other liabilities and provisions.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DisclosureOfNotesOnSegmentsExp: Capital, Employees stock options outstanding, Reserves and Minority Interest is Rs. 608444.43 crore has been included under un -allocable liabilities as there is no provision for the same in the utility.
